title: Capsella oelandica
intro: Capsella oelandica, also known as shepherds' cress or Oeland's shepherds' cress, is an annual plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing symptoms of menopause and menorrhagia. Capsella oelandica contains bioactive constituents such as isothiocyanates, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Capsella oelandica is often used to prepare tinctures, infusions, and teas, and is sometimes combined with other plants to alleviate symptoms of menstrual disorders and menopause.
